case_title: SOLANKI, VIRENDRASIN vs. BRAXTON, GIOVANNI ALBERTO et al

docket_entries.description: DEPT. 5, JUDGE WICK, CSR BRENDA FIELDS, CLERK E.MONTI COMPLT FILED: 10-14-93 3:20 PM C/C FOR SETTL CONF. COUNSEL, ARNOLD EVJE PRESENT FOR PLTF. DEFT, ROSEMARY JACKSON PRESENT IN PRO PER. DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO GIOVANNI ALBERTO BRAXTON. A JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIP READ INTO THE RECORD AND SIGNED IN OPEN COURT BY DEFT.

DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRAXTON, GIOVANNI ALBERTO JACKSON, ROSEMARY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 41 SIXTH ST. 	, S.F., STAYED UNTIL DEC-01-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, STAY TO 9AM, DEC. 01, 1993. FAILURE TO COMPLY, DEFT TO PAY $330.00 RENT PLUS $80.00 COSTS, DAMAGES OF $15.71 PER DAY FROM 9-30-93 TO 12-01-93. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
